rationale: The system shall record all match events with a timestamp.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: essential | Role: control (no contradiction) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy match_event_recorded_with_timestamp

rationale: The system shall allow referees to update game event data in real time.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: essential | Role: contradiction side A (always) | FRET confidence: high | Source: IFA GT-007/GT-008
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy referee_game_data_update_permitted

rationale: The system shall never allow referees to update game event data.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: essential | Role: contradiction side B (never) | FRET confidence: high | Synthetic: direct negation of CONTRA-001
fulltext: the system shall never satisfy referee_game_data_update_permitted
